title: An Ordinance enacting the Supplemental Budget amounting to Twenty-Five Million Four Hundred Forty-Three Thousand Six Hundred Seventy-Seven Pesos and 36/100 (Php 25,443,677.36) chargeable against personal services savings of the current year for various purposes and reverting the amount of Three Million One Hundred Fifty Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (Php 3,150,000.00) from Capital expense to maintenance and operating expense under the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund current
